visual.name: canvasBarChart
visual.description: Bar and column chart with stacked, clustered, and lollipop layouts. Supports gradient fills, a category zoom slider, data-driven marker images, and track-bar targets. Fully keyboard-navigable and respects Power BI high-contrast themes.

dataRoles.name: category
dataRoles.description: The category field for the X-axis

dataRoles.name: measure
dataRoles.description: Numeric measures for bar height (each measure becomes a series)

dataRoles.name: tooltips
dataRoles.description: Additional measures to show in tooltips only (not rendered as bars)

dataRoles.name: target
dataRoles.description: Target/goal value for track bars only (not rendered as bars)

dataRoles.name: imageUrlField
dataRoles.description: URL field for marker images (one URL per category)

dataRoles.name: legend
dataRoles.description: Group data by this field (creates series from legend values)

showBox.description: Show/hide legend background, border, and shadow
